lines.lyrics: Waiting on the corner underneath the streetlight
Neon signs a buzzin in the shadows of the night
Come on now baby can you take my breath away
You give me what I want and we'll go our separate ways
She lays back and feels her life going by
I never came here to start living this lie
I ran out of bread and it's 40 degrees
I'll do anything I can to start making the green

lines.chords: Em  A7  Em  A7  Em  A7
lines.lyrics: Oh the signs never told me my rights from wrongs
Now I belong to the streets and I'm wise to the heat

lines.chords: Em  A7  Em  A7  Em  A7
lines.lyrics: Money's a game that I've cheated in all my life
You called it strife
The city is gonna teach you what the world never could
You lost the balance and you started to sway
They never wanted you and you wanted it that way
You got on a vessel and you never looked back
Into the LA station with no plan of attack
Then you found out how many more were like you
They scheme and lie and forced you right into the blues
A million sins in a city where the darkness hides in the light
And the moonshine exposes creatures crawling through the night
